# Elle Anderson

> Elle Anderson is a Product and Transformation Leader who builds data science, machine learning and AI products for global organisations, and builds the product people and cultures that sustain them. She is a Fellow of BCS, The Chartered Institute for IT (FBCS) and an elected member of BCS Council. She is bylined as an author on the U.S. Army's national news site, army.mil.

## About
- Name: Elle Anderson
- Role: Product and Transformation Leader (data science, machine learning and AI products since 2018; product capability building; agile and digital transformation).
- Professional standing: Fellow of BCS, The Chartered Institute for IT (FBCS); elected member of BCS Council.
- Education: MBA, Edinburgh Napier University; AI Programme, University of Oxford (Saïd Business School). ICF and ICAgile coaching certifications.
- Companies worked with include LEGO, Bupa, Kraft Heinz, Capital One, Lloyds, Tesco Bank, Bloomberg, Domino's and Walmart.
- Public service and publishing: volunteer Public Affairs Officer, U.S. Army Garrison Benelux; author of articles on army.mil; one story selected by higher headquarters (IMCOM) for the command-wide IMCOM News Sampler.

## Key links
- Website: https://andersonco.uk/
- About: https://andersonco.uk/about.html
- Field notes: https://andersonco.uk/field-notes.html
- Free tools: https://andersonco.uk/free-tools.html
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andersonelle/
- GitHub: https://github.com/elleanderson

## Published work on army.mil (U.S. Army)
- Improved, optimized services drive $39M cost reduction: https://www.army.mil/article/292519/improved_optimized_services_drive_39m_cost_reduction
- A 45-year career fueled by lifelong learning: https://www.army.mil/article/288494/a_45_year_career_fueled_by_lifelong_learning
- Notes from the USAG Benelux in Brussels Town Hall and Newcomers Brief: https://www.army.mil/article/288600/notes_from_the_usag_benelux_in_brussels_town_hall_and_newcomers_brief_sept_18_2025
